description_long: This is a standard 330 ml Coca-Cola can, cylindrical in shape with a vibrant red background and white script branding. The can features the iconic Coca-Cola logo prominently displayed in a large, flowing font, wrapping around the body. Nutritional information, barcodes, and recycling symbols are printed in white and green on the back and side panels. The top is metallic silver with a pull-tab opening mechanism, typical of aluminum beverage cans. The surface shows some minor scuff marks and wear, indicating light use or handling. The can is made primarily of aluminum and is designed to contain carbonated beverages.
description: A red Coca-Cola aluminum can with white branding, metallic top, and visible product details. The surface shows minor wear and typical beverage can features.
description_view_0: The Coca-Cola logo is partially visible, with nutritional information and barcode clearly shown on the left side.
description_view_1: The can's side displays more of the nutritional label and the edge of the Coca-Cola script, with the pull-tab top visible.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the large, white Coca-Cola logo in the center, with minimal text and branding details.
description_view_3: The can's side shows the continuation of the Coca-Cola logo and some nutritional information, with the metallic top and pull-tab visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo wraps around the can, with nutritional information, barcode, and recycling symbols in white and green. The branding is bold and highly visible against the red background.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Minor surface scratches and scuff marks are visible.
